channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Rust (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Rust nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🦀 googleworkspace/cli (22934 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: googleworkspace

📝 Repository: googleworkspace/cli

📄 Descrizione: Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes AI agent skills.

⭐ Stelle: 22934

🍴 Forks: 1115

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: agent-skills ai-agent automation cli discovery-api gemini-cli-extension google-admin google-api google-calendar google-chat google-docs google-drive google-sheets google-workspace oauth2 rust

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-02T19:46:06Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-29T04:33:31Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:

📝 Repository: Infatoshi/OpenSquirrel

item.title: 🦀 nashsu/opencli-rs (942 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nashsu

📝 Repository: nashsu/opencli-rs

📄 Descrizione: Opencli-rs is a Blazing fast, memory-safe command-line tool — Fetch information from any website with a single command. Covers Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, HackerNews, Bilibili, Zhihu, Xiaohongshu, and 55+ sites, with support for controlling Electron desktop apps, integrating local CLI tools (gh, docker, kubectl)

⭐ Stelle: 942

🍴 Forks: 70

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-24T03:04:29Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-29T04:26:31Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 joaoh82/rustunnel (594 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: joaoh82

📝 Repository: joaoh82/rustunnel

📄 Descrizione: **Rustunnel** is a open-source tunnel service written in Rust that replicates the core functionality of ngrok. It exposes local services running behind NAT/firewalls to the public internet through a relay server self-hosted or our managed service.

⭐ Stelle: 594

🍴 Forks: 40

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: api-gateway reverse-proxy rust rustunnel

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0
